history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, black and white, high-contrast, moody, and provocative portrait of a person wearing a white knitted balaclava. The balaclava covers the entire face except for the eyes and mouth. Dramatic, heavy eye makeup with long, false eyelashes is visible through the eyeholes. The lips are painted with dark lipstick and are slightly parted, with the tongue visible, licking the lower lip. The person's left hand is brought up to the side of their face, with fingers resting near the balaclava. They are wearing a light-colored, ribbed garment underneath, possibly a tank top or sweater. The background is completely black, creating a stark contrast with the illuminated subject. The lighting is dramatic and directional, casting shadows that emphasize the contours of the balaclava and the person's features. The overall mood is mysterious, edgy, and somewhat defiant. There are subtle, dark markings or tattoos visible on the balaclava near the cheekbone area, adding to the intrigue. The image has a grainy, vintage aesthetic.
